title: eragrostis pilosa subsp. multicaulis
intro: Eragrostis pilosa subsp. multicaulis, also known as 'dwarf love grass', is a type of grass found in various parts of Asia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Eragrostis pilosa subsp. multicaulis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
